name: Marmalade Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (eggs, milk, chopped nuts, melted shortening, orange marmalade, and grated orange rind) until just combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it.
6. Cool completely on a wire rack.
7. Serve with cream cheese, if desired.
